name: @chbrain/khai-engine-superstition
description: khai engine content, the superstition domain: magical causation as position -- the link a persona reads between events that share no mechanism, by contact, resemblance, control, sign, or luck.
license: SEE LICENSE IN LICENSE and LICENSE-CODE

khai.tagline: Magical causation as position: the link a persona reads between events that share no mechanism -- by contact, resemblance, control, sign, or luck. The read holds against disconfirmation because it cannot be disproved from within.

card.wire: Attaches at Position. The anchor (position_superstition.md) declares a magical-causal read: the persona holds a link between events that share no mechanism -- an act, object, sign, or contact taken to bear on an outcome it cannot reach. The law makes the persona that is given the engine carry one such read.
card.issue: Five links a persona may read where none exists -- contagion (trace passes by touch), similarity (the image is the thing), control (one's act sways chance), omen (a sign carries intent), and luck (fortune adheres and is spent). Each is a position under the root; the persona occupies one toward a given object or event. Its mark is that disconfirming evidence does not move it: the link reads a null result as the wrong rite or the dormant charge, never as no link.
card.require: Two altitudes hold the engine. The law: declared once in the project's Instructions Knowledge chapter, linking the anchor, so the read is understood wherever it appears. The link: each persona given the engine carries, under Projection, the specific magical link it reads in the scene.
card.enforce: Structure is checked; coherence is judged. The kit verifies the floor: the law is declared and each persona that holds the engine links a real position. Whether the magical link is true to the persona, and held against the evidence in its own terms, is semantic, taught and reviewed, never failed by the suite.
card.setup: Declare the law in the Instructions Knowledge chapter, linking the anchor. Then give the superstitious persona its read under Projection -- the specific link it holds, carrying the anchor upward. Read it in what the persona does under uncertainty and how it explains away the miss, never as a label.
